executives.name: Douglas Smerchanski
executives.background: Mr. Smerchanski has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry and has held senior positions at several public companies.

executives.name: Peter Smerchanski
executives.background: Mr. Smerchanski is a professional engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies.

executives.name: Ross McElroy
executives.background: Mr. McElroy is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has been instrumental in several major uranium discoveries, including the Triple R deposit. He previously held positions with Cameco Corp., Areva, and BHP Billiton.

executives.name: Teresa Cherry
executives.background: Ms. Cherry has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry and has held senior positions at several public companies. She is a Chartered Professional Accountant.
